---
title: "Adding Developer Tools to Vivenu"
sidebarTitle: "Developer Tools"
description: "How to install and request the relevant packages under Developer Tools in Vivenu for FKL website integrations."
---

## Overview

This SOP details how to install and request the relevant packages under Developer Tools in Vivenu. This allows you to support the various sellers on Vivenu correctly for linking to the FKL websites.

<Note>
  This SOP assumes you already know how to access and navigate Vivenu. If you need access, [email support](mailto:advanced-technology-c0a6ecefe97b@intake.linear.app)..
</Note>

---

## Prerequisites

None.

---

## Installing Relevant Packages

<Steps>
  <Step title="Log in to Vivenu">
    Navigate to [dashboard.vivenu.com](https://dashboard.vivenu.com/) and log in.

    ![Vivenu dashboard](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-dashboard.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Navigate to Marketplace">
    Select **Marketplace** from the left hand sidebar.

    ![Vivenu Marketplace](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-marketplace.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Install API Keys">
    Search for **API Keys** and click **Install**.

    ![API Keys search result](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-api-keys-search.png)

    ![API Keys install](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-api-keys-install.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Request Webhooks">
    Search for **Webhooks** and click **Request**.

    ![Webhooks search result](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-webhooks-search.png)

    ![Webhooks request](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-webhooks-request.png)

    This will open a chat with Vivenu support. They will ask which seller you wish to have Webhooks applied to — speak with them to get access.

    ![Vivenu support chat](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-support-chat.png)
  </Step>
  <Step title="Confirm installation">
    Navigate to the **Developer** menu in the left hand sidebar. You should now see both **Webhooks** and **API Keys** listed.

    ![Developer menu with Webhooks and API Keys](/images/software/vivenu/dev-tools-developer-menu.png)
  </Step>
</Steps>
